stargazing.program-arrival-desc: Arrive by car 15–20 minutes before the start and take a comfortable spot in the designated area of the field.
stargazing.program-lecture-desc: As dusk falls — an engaging lecture about space on a big screen, about an hour long.
stargazing.program-sky-desc: We learn to spot bright stars and constellations right in the night sky overhead.
stargazing.program-telescope-desc: Several telescopes are aimed at different objects — take a look and ask the astronomers your questions.
